messages.content: hey everyone! so simona's 40th is march 15 and i want to throw a surprise dinner for her. thinking somewhere nice in JP, maybe a private room? you all in?
omg YES 🎉
im so down for this
Hey Kai! What a great idea. Count me in! What are you thinking for a venue?
I can make it work. Count me in.
amazing!! so ive been looking at a few places and chez laurent has a private dining room. they do prix fixe menus for group events
chez laurent is soooo good 😍
That sounds wonderful! Do they have vegetarian options? I know at least a couple people who'll need that.
ill find out. fletcher can you think about who else from church we should invite?
How many people total.
UPDATE: booked the private dining room at chez laurent!! march 15 7pm 🎉🎉
YESSS 🙌🙌🙌
This is going to be so special! Do you need help with decorations or anything?
yes actually. tamara would you want to make like a banner or somethign? you are the designer after all
say less ✨ ill make something cute
just did the walkthrough at chez laurent. you guys the room is beautiful
fits 20 easily. theres a little patio area off it too
Can't wait to see it! 🎵
Booked my train. Hartford to South Station, arriving around 4 on the 15th.
perfect!! so glad you can make it
aww this is gonna be so good 😭
ok final headcount update: 14 confirmed
menu is all set too. maria at chez laurent has been amazing
Outstanding! I'll get there by 6:30 to help set up. Want me to bring my Bluetooth speaker for some background music?
yes that would be great!
bringing the banner and some photo frames for the table 📸
TOMORROW. everyone remember do not text simona about dinner plans lol
my lips are sealed 🤐
Wouldn't dream of it! See everyone tomorrow! 🎉
All set. See you tomorrow.
ok so i did a thing
i recorded a podcast episode
WAIT WHAT
i mean its terrible but i just talked for 20 minutes about why i play bass and how it connects to faith
omggg send it to me rn
ok here
please dont judge me
listening 🎧
ok i listened
kai this is actually good??
stop
im being real!! ur voice is so calming. the part about finding the bass line in hymns was 😭
the audio quality is garbage tho right
yea u need a real mic lol but the content is ✨✨✨
ok im looking into mics. and please do not tell anyone about this
my lips are sealed 🤐
i have clip #2
be honest does this sound dumb
its about doubt
lol u always do this
sending me something good and then asking if its dumb
gimme a sec
ok so this one is about doubt?
yeah. like how do you keep showing up on sunday when youre not sure about any of it
ngl this hit different
like i teared up a little at the end part
really??
yes really stop being surprised when ur good at things
the audio is better right? i got that mic
sooo much better. still a lil echo tho
yeah i think i need to figure out how to soundproof my closet or something
lmaooo recording in the closet like a true artist 💀
this is my life now
third one
this one is about why bass players think differently than other musicians
ooh ok listening
ok that was so interesting
the metaphor about bass being the foundation nobody notices until its gone??
thats like a whole sermon right there
haha thanks. i feel like this one is the best one so far
it definately is
the audio sounds really clean too
i finally figured out the noise gate in audacity
u should just publish these kai
im not ready
ur never gonna feel ready lol
ok so i need gift ideas for simona. i keep going back and forth
lol of course u are
what are u thinking so far
idk like jewelry? custom art print? a weekend away somewhere?
weekend away is cute but with maya thats a whole logisitics thing
true
what about something personal like a photo thing
oooh like a photo book?
YES like form shutterfly or artifact uprising
all ur fav pics together, maya as a baby, wedding stuff 📸
ok that might actually be perfect. she would absolutely cry
she would 100% cry lol
ok i finally decided. photo book from shutterfly. going all out
FINALLY lol
honestly best choice tho
i spent like 3 weeks comparing shutterfly vs artifact uprising vs mixbook
three weeks 💀 kai
ok totally different topic
ive been thinking about this podcast thing and i cant decide if i should actually publish it
omg yes u should
but like what if no one listens
or worse what if people i KNOW listen
lol which one is worse
both??
fletcher would lose his mind if he found out
ok true he would try to make it a whole church production lol
EXACTLY
and denise would be like why are you spending time on this instead of the bartlett brief
ok but like
none of those ppl get to decide what u do with ur creative energy
i know. i know that logically
then stop overthinking it
overthinking is literally my whole personality
lmaooo fair
look just keep recording. u dont have to publish tmrw. but dont talk urself out of it either
ok. yeah. ok
ok new clip
i think this might be the best one
listening
KAI
this is so good
the part where u talk about playing bass at ur moms church as a kid
i literally got chills
ok i need to tell you something
i almost hit publish last night
omggggg
i had my finger on the button and everything
and then i closed the laptop
kai 😭
i know i know
one day ur gonna just do it and its gonna feel amazing
maybe
tamara
yea
i have five episodes recorded now
five
and zero published lol
you didnt have to say it like that
😂 u know i love u
i keep going back and listening to them and finding things wrong
kai theyre good
ive heard every single one
they are genuinely good
what if people think its weird that a paralegal has a podcast about bass and faith
what if people think its AMAZING that a paralegal has a podcast about bass and faith
lol
seriously tho. u have a real voice for this. stop sitting on it
worst case nobody listens and u had fun making something
thats actually a really good point
best case ppl hear it and it means something to them
just like it meant something to me when i heard it
ok stop youre going to make me cry
DO IT. just hit publish on one episode. just one.
ill think about it
ok ok ill SERIOUSLY think about it
thats all i ask ❤️
how was mom yesterday? she said you took her to the doc
Stable. Same meds. She is tired but not bad.
ok. thanks for going. i wish i could be there more
You have Maya. I'm fine handling this.
hey are you still good for march 15? need to give the restaurant a final headcount soon
Yes. Taking the day off. Train gets in around 4.
perfect. simona is going to be so surprised to see you
Looking forward to it.
Booked the train for March 14. Will stay at the Holiday Inn near you.
perfect. thank you for making the trip
Wouldn't miss it.
On the train. ETA 4:30 PM.
got it - text when you're at south station
Dinner was perfect. Simona had no idea. Well done.
🥹 thank you for coming. and for keeping the secret
did you see that wnba email about boston getting a team
yes!!
I can't believe we're finally getting a team
right?? the boston tempo. td garden starting next summer
how much are tickets
full season is way too much. but theres a 6 game plan for $264 per seat
so about $530 for both of us
basically yeah
that's a lot with daycare and everything
i know. just putting it on your radar
we'll talk about it ❤️
so i was looking at teh tempo ticket packages again
heres the pricing
you've been obsessing over this
i prefer the word researching
the 6 game plan lets us pick which games and most are saturdays
saturday would work for finding a sitter
exactly. i ran the numbers and if we skip a couple date nights its doable
you made a spreadsheet didn't you
let me think about it a few more days
ok about the tempo tickets
yes??
did you see the holiday discount email
15% off partial plans through the 18th
wait how did you see it before me
I signed up for their emails too 😊
lol ok so thats like $449 for both of us
I think we should do it
seriously?
we never do anything fun for just us
ok im looking at the schedule. theres 6 saturday games taht would work
buy them before you overthink it 😊
ITS DONE
we are going to wnba games!!
ahh which games
may 16, june 6, june 20, july 11, july 25, aug 8. all saturdays
I'm so excited 😊
added them all to the calendar
Maya looks so big in those Halloween pictures Simona sent. My goodness.
she's getting tall! talks nonstop now too 😂
Saw the photo. She's tall like Dad was.
she IS! kai keeps telling her she'll be 7 feet tall and she believes it
How is everyone? My A1C came down a tiny bit. 7.2 to 7.0. Doctor was happy.
Mom that's good. Keep doing what's working.
thats great mom! whatever youre doing keep it up ❤️
Gloria! That's wonderful 🥳 we're proud of you
happy thanksgiving everyone 🦃
Happy Thanksgiving to my family. Eat well.
Happy Thanksgiving.
miss everyone. wish we could be in hartford this year ❤️
did everyone get our christmas card?
Got it. Maya looks great.
I have it on the fridge. She is precious.
merry christmas everyone! 🎄
Merry Christmas family ❤️ we love you
Merry Christmas. Maya is the best gift.
Merry Christmas.
happy new year! 🎉
happiest new year ❤️❤️
Happy New Year. Be well.
maya turned 3 today!! 🎂
Three! I cannot believe it. Tell her grandma loves her.
Happy birthday Maya. Sending a card.
she had the BEST morning at centre street cafe ❤️
Anyone hear from Lionel about the mom situation? She seemed tired Sunday.
Mom's tired but stable. Doctor sees her Friday. I'll update.
thanks lionel ❤️ love you mom hang in there
Tell Simona happy 40th from me! 40 is when life starts.
will do!! 🎉
thank you gloria ❤️ love you
Heading to Maya's pediatrician in April? Mom asks.
yes 21st. she's healthy as can be 👍
Hey Kai! Setlist for this Sunday is up — same as last week minus the closer. Cool?
yep, sounds good
Christmas Eve setlist coming this week. Heads up we want a walking bass line on Hark the Herald! 🎸
ooh fun. send it over when you have it
Sheet music in your inbox! Rehearsals Dec 8, 15, 22 at 6:30. You ready?
got it. ready 👍
DUDE the walking line on Hark sounded amazing tonight. Don't change a thing.
haha thanks. i practiced way too much
That's how you know it's a good one. See y'all Monday.
Reminder: rehearsal moved to 6:00 tomorrow not 6:30
thanks 👍
Monday final rehearsal — please come 15 min early for sound check
will do
CHRISTMAS EVE WAS PERFECT. Pastor Jim said it was the best music night they've had. Thank you Kai 🎵
🥹 thank YOU. that walking line on hark felt amazing live
January setlist — let's keep things simple. Same as last Jan.
sounds good
FYI — there's a new acoustic open mic at Loring on the last Sat of every month. You should think about it 🎸
haha noted
Easter setlist coming this week. We're doing a longer service this year — maybe 8 songs?
8 is a lot. ok send it
Easter rehearsal Friday April 3 at 6:30. Final one before Sunday.
Sound check Sunday at 8 sharp! Coffee on me.
you're on
EASTER WAS INCREDIBLE. Best set of the year. Praise be 🙌
🥹 felt good
pond at 10? 🐕
yes!
biscuit was UNHINGED today lmaoo
💀 he saw a squirrel and lost it
tmrw morning?
cant — early thing. sat tho
10am sat ✨
raining ☔️ skip?
skip. biscuit will live
ur dog hates the rain like an old man
saturday???
10am pond
biscuit found ANOTHER chicken bone smh
OF COURSE HE DID 😩
lol coco's collar broke send me a pic of biscuits one ill order
thx perfect
way too cold today. coffee instead?
yes pls. ula?
pond at 10 sat?
yes!
biscuit + coco are a power couple at the pond i said it
literally a friendship for the ages 🥹
wompppp raining
rain check (literally)
FINALLY warm. pond at 10?
omg yes
biscuit fully swam today pls
i had to towel him off in the bathtub it took 20 min
got the new dog tag — biscuit. silver. he looks like a fancy boy
FANCY BOY 😂😂
Hi sweetheart. How was your week?
good mom! work busy as always. how are you feeling?
I am OK. The medication makes me tired but the doctor says it's normal.
❤️ rest when you can. lionel said your numbers came down some - thats great
Thank you. How is little Maya?
she's amazing. talking SO much now. asks 'why' about literally everything
Save the videos for me!
Beautiful. She has Simona's eyes.
Don't forget Lionel's birthday is the 12th.
thanks for the reminder. ill text him
🎄 merry christmas mom
Merry Christmas baby. I love you.
THREE! Look at her smile. ❤️
Doctor visit Friday. Lionel is coming with me.
good. tell me how it goes ❤️
He says I am stable. Same medications. I just need to walk more.
you got this mom. one walk a day - even just down the block
happy easter mom 🌷
Happy Easter baby. Tell Simona I made the lemon bars she asked for.
she'll love that
Hey - random thought, would you ever want to play a wedding gig with me? Friend of mine getting married in spring 🎵
ha probably not. between work and maya i have zero extra hours
Worth asking! No pressure
Found a great resource on praise & worship bass — I'll forward
appreciate it 👍
Quick — can I tell Sara from the band you'd cover bass for the Hilltown camp Saturday in Feb? Need a fill-in.
which sat? the 7th i can. anything later i cant - simona's birthday season
It's the 7th. You're a lifesaver!
cool. send details
Hilltown camp went well right? Sara was raving about your line on 'Holy Spirit'
they were great to play with. would do again
OK new push: Loring open mic March 28. I'll drive your amp.
swamped with the hennessey deposition. maybe later in the year
Next time then! Don't forget — you're really good 🎸
Easter went so well 🥹 talk to you Wed
Kai, the Bartlett discovery folder needs the Nov 14 supplement. Can you confirm it's in?
yes - filed yesterday. confirmation in the case folder
Thank you.
Running 10 minutes late. Push our 1:1 to 2:10.
no problem
Hennessey Day 2 on Feb 11 — 9 AM start. Confirm the witness is set with O'Brien for the morning prep.
confirmed with their office today. Mike from O'Brien is set 7:30 AM at the firm.
Good.
Take Friday afternoon. Good work this week.
thanks denise
hi maria! confirming the walkthrough is sat feb 22 at 2 pm — looking forward to it
Hi Kai - confirmed, see you Saturday at 2. The dining room will be set up so you can get the full feel.
the walkthrough was perfect. lets lock in march 15 at 7
Wonderful. I'll send the deposit invoice in the morning and we'll be set.
menu changes — can we do the cod for the main instead of the salmon? simona prefers it
Of course. Cod is no problem. I'll resend the menu confirmation today.
thank you maria. final headcount is 14 — confirmed last night
14 is perfect. We're all set for Sunday. Doors at 6:45.
Last night was beautiful Kai. Simona looked so happy.
🥹 thank you for everything maria. it was perfect
hi all! kelsey suggested we start a thread for class logistics. anyone else here?
Brendan here, Theo's dad. 👋
hi everyone - nia, maeve's mom!
hey 👋 kai, maya's parent
and Simona! Maya's other mom 🙂
perfect. thanksgiving potluck the school is doing - i'll bring rolls
We can bring drinks - juice boxes ok?
maya doesnt do dairy great so well bring a fruit platter
i'll do a salad!
snow day tomorrow??? did u all see the email?
Yep just got it. Closed tomorrow.
ugh. ok. thx for the heads up
valentine's party reminder - everyone bring 12 valentines + nut-free snack
got it 👍
anyone interested in a saturday playdate at jamaica pond? this sat 11am?
yes! we'll be there
Theo would love that. We're in.
Reminder: pickup deadline 5:45 PM. Late fee applies after.
Closed Wed Nov 26 + Thu Nov 27 for Thanksgiving holiday.
Maya had a great day painting. See pictures in the parent portal.
Snow day Thu Jan 8 - center closed.
Maya was a little fussy after lunch. Possibly teething molars. Took her temp - normal.
Reminder: Valentine's classroom party Friday Feb 13.
Conference scheduling email sent - please check inbox.
Spring break: April 13-17. Center closed.
Hi Kai - confirming our nutrition consult Tuesday Jan 20 at 12:15. Bring your food log if you started one.
hi rachel - confirmed. ill bring what ive been logging this week
Great session today. Plan summary in your email.
thank you rachel
Confirming follow-up Feb 17 at 12:15.
confirmed
Lab values look great. Keep doing what you're doing.
thank you - really appreciate the support
hi mira - going to drop off our tax docs friday march 6 around 5:30 if thats ok
Hi Kai - Friday 5:30 works. I'll be at the office until 6.
great - see you then
Got everything. Will start drafting and review with you Sunday.
Returns are filed. Federal refund on the way. Email has details.
thank you so much mira
Reminder: Biscuit's annual exam Sat Nov 15 at 10 AM with Dr. Chen.
thanks - confirmed
Reminder: Biscuit dental cleaning Sun Jan 25 at 9 AM. No food after midnight Saturday.
got it 👍
Reminder: Fig annual exam Tue Feb 10 at 2 PM.
confirmed
hi mike - this is kai allen, 184 perkins st apt 2. landlord said you'd be by wed at 10 for the kitchen faucet
Hi Kai - yes, see you Wed between 10 and 11. I'll text 15 min out.
20 min out
👍 buzzer is broken just knock
All set - cartridge was the issue. Should be drip-free now.
thanks mike! 🙏
yo. so the reunion next year - planning has officially started. you in?
haha let me see how next fall is shaping up. would love to in theory
no pressure. ill keep you in the loop
kai!! congrats on baby maya 🥺❤️ i saw the announcement, she is PRECIOUS
thank you angela!! we are very tired but very in love 🥹
hey kai - some mail came to my place addressed to you. the old allston apt forwarding finally died i guess. can drop it in the mail or hand off
ugh sorry! mail it whenever, no rush. ill venmo for postage
no worries it's fine. dropping in the box monday.
hey! my kid is finally over the cold from hell. should we try that playdate again?
yes! i'll look at the calendar this weekend and get back to you
thanks again for the bookshelf help last weekend. owe you a beer
anytime. that thing is a beast 😅
Kai, thank you for the music on Christmas Eve. The walking line on Hark stayed with me all week.
thank you pastor jim 🥹 means a lot
Could you stop by the office Wed before rehearsal? Want to chat about a deacon nomination.
wed works - i'll be there at 6
Easter went beautifully. Praise be.
kai!! happy birthday to maya from us! how is she 3 already
i KNOW. thank you craig ❤️ how are the boys?
loud. always loud. miss you guys
miss you too. boston in spring? we have the air mattress
💯 ill check dates with mei
Heads up - hot water heater is being serviced building-wide tomorrow 9-12. Brief outages expected.
thanks for the heads up
Snow plow contractor is on Centre St around 6 AM tomorrow. Please move any belongings out of the small front area if you can.
got it 👍
Quarterly fire alarm test tomorrow morning 10 AM, brief beep cycle in all units.
thanks
Hi Kai - quick heads up Maya took a small tumble on the playground today. Tiny scrape on her elbow, no other concerns. She was back to playing in 5 minutes.
thank you for letting me know! she didnt mention it at pickup, but she wouldnt 😅
She is a tough one. 💪
Maya picked the same Brown Bear book for read-aloud third day in a row. She is officially Brown-Bear-pilled.
😂 we read it every night at home too. iconic
Conference Friday will be quick - she's doing great. Mostly want to talk about reading at home.
looking forward to it ❤️
